questions: pc ta slow hoye gese help koro
wifi kaj korche na fix koro
answers: Bro ami tech help korte pari, ki problem bolo detail e! 😊
Ha vai, tech problem hole bolo — dekhi ki korte pari! Detail e likh ektu!
Problem ta detail e likho bro, ami free hole dekhe solution di!
Ekhon ektu busy achi, but msg rekhe dao problem ta — pore dekhi! 😄
Ha bhai, tech help er jonno amake bolo! Problem ta details e likh, solve korbo try korbo!
